system.description: There is a particular type of melee or thrown weapon with which you are especially proficient. The choice must be specific, such as “cutlasses” or “sabers”. “Swords” or even “backswords” is too general. Whenever using this kind of weapon, each Fortune Point you use for Melee or Damage rolls gives a bonus of +2 instead of +1 after the roll. A Fortune Point spent before rolling gives a Bonus Die and adds +1 to the result.
